title: SELECT on view only works once
poc: create view c as select * from a;
key_bug_features: SELECT on view fails after first execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
CREATE VIEW user_view AS SELECT id, name, COALESCE(age, 0) AS age FROM users;
